title: Route Map
description: The first version focuses on scheduling clarity: turn your stops into a usable route timeline.

placeholders.stops: One stop per line, for example: Hotel / Museum / Cafe / Riverfront

summaryDescription: {{count}} stops planned. Start at {{start}} and expect the final stop around {{end}}.
segmentDescription: Plan about {{stayGap}} minutes on-site and {{moveGap}} minutes for transfers.
lastStop: Final stop. Good candidate for dinner or a slow wrap-up.
